message:
Add Rocket icon for 'Built in 5 Days' nav + dynamic goto targets

site-header.tsx:
- Added Rocket to the lucide-react import and mapped it to the
  'built in 5 days' label in getIcon(), fixing a missing icon
  case that would fall through to the default LayoutGrid
- Mobile bottom nav now renders all navItems instead of slicing
  to the first N, so every page is accessible from the tab bar
  without opening the drawer

site-terminal.tsx:
- Added missing navItems import from lib/content
- The 'goto' command now derives valid slugs dynamically from
  navItems.map(item => item.href) instead of a hardcoded list,
  so new pages added to navItems are automatically navigable
  from the terminal without code changes
- Added 'home' as a special-case target that navigates to '/'
- Error message includes 'home' in the valid targets list

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
